title: Cobbledex PLA
body:
# PLA Resource Pack Style for Cobblemon Pokedex (Cobbledex)

**Compatibility**
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Minecraft: 1.20.1 supported.
Cobblemon Pokedex (Cobbledex) 1.1.0 [https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-pokedex](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-pokedex)

**Special Thanks**
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Thank you [rafa](https://modrinth.com/user/Rafacasari) for the excellent work you did with your mod. Your work is truly impressive and greatly appreciated, considering how quickly you did it and the many hours you dedicated to it!
